content: TP-182 is genuinely blocked in Step 1 by an incomplete lane checkout. I completed Step 0 preflight and confirmed from the main repo how the dashboard currently loads `/api/state` + `/api/history`, but this execution worktree/branch only contains `.pi/`, `docs/`, `hello-taskplane*.md`, and `taskplane-tasks/`. The prompt’s required implementation targets (`dashboard/server.cjs`, `dashboard/public/*`, `extensions/taskplane/*`, `extensions/tests/*`, plus test prerequisites like `package.json` and `extensions/tests/loader.mjs`) do not exist here. I verified this via direct file reads, `find`, and `git ls-tree -r HEAD`. Editing the main repo copy would violate the execution checkout contract and would not produce a valid lane-branch diff. STATUS.md has full blocker details. Please restage/rebase this lane with the full source tree or provide a checkout that includes the dashboard/extensions files.
